title: Rexo policy configuration schema
description: Schema for policy files that provide shared command and alias baselines.

$schema.description: Schema URI/path used by editors and validators for policy files.

schemaVersion.description: Policy schema contract version. Currently only 1.0 is supported.

name.description: Human-friendly policy name shown in diagnostics/output.

description.description: Optional longer description of what the policy provides.

commands.description: Policy-defined commands merged into repository command space.

aliases.description: Policy-defined command aliases. Key is alias name, value is command target.

repoCommand.description: Command definition contributed by a policy.

description.description: Human-readable command summary shown in help/list output.

args.description: Positional argument declarations keyed by argument name.

options.description: Named option declarations keyed by option name.

steps.description: Ordered execution steps for this command.

merge.description: Layered command composition mode for this command.

argConfig.description: Configuration for a positional command argument.

required.description: Whether this positional argument must be provided by the user.

description.description: Help text shown for the argument.

optionConfig.description: Configuration for a named command option.

default.description: Default value applied when the option is omitted.

allowed.description: Optional allowed values list enforced at runtime.

step.description: Single executable unit in a command pipeline. Exactly one of run, uses, or command must be set.

id.description: Stable step identifier for logging and dependency wiring.

command.description: Invokes another configured command by name.

uses.description: Invokes a built-in primitive (for example builtin:verify).

when.description: Conditional expression that controls whether the step executes.

with.description: String key/value inputs passed to the selected built-in or command.

description.description: Optional step summary shown in plan/log output.

whenExists.description: Only for command steps. When true, missing target commands are skipped successfully instead of failing.

continueOnError.description: Continue executing later steps when this step fails.

dependsOn.description: List of step ids that must complete before this step can run.
